docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOOTEN, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATOCK, JAMES $2,240.00 PRINCIPAL, $82.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,322.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AT THE ELECTION OF THE PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT,NOT LATER THAN JULY 18, 2014, MAY RETURN TO PLAINTIFF, THE MACHINERY, A SAW, THAT IS THE SUBJECT OF THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO JAMES PATOCK 155 CAPP STREET SAN FRACISCO CA. 9411
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 32.00 -
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: AUG-20-2014 - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 32.00 - AS TO DEFENDANT PATOCK, JAMES

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-25-2014 IS CONTINUED TO OCT-09-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-11-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-11-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. FIOL. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2014 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,240.00 FILED BY WOOTEN, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT PATOCK, JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DAVID WOOTEN ON 09/25/14. ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER-NO SUCH NUMBER-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $32.00 - SERVED MAY-07-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PATOCK, JAMES
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT PATOCK, JAMES HEARING SET FOR SEP-25-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2014; JUDGMENT DEBTOR JAMES PATOCK FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT $500.00. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
